summary.key_theme: 市場因油價飆升與聯準會鷹派立場引發停滯性通膨擔憂，導致 S&P 500 指數跌破 200 日均線，技術面與宏觀經濟壓力沉重。

bullish.title: Is the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF the Smartest Investment You Can Make Before March Ends?
bullish.reason: 文章強調當前市場回調提供了「低買」機會，且科技股領導地位有望回歸，適合長期投資者進場。

bullish.title: Should You Buy the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF After the Recent Stock Market Sell-Off?
bullish.reason: 指出歷史數據顯示市場波動往往是長期投資的絕佳機會，鼓勵投資者在賣壓中保持信心。

bullish.title: Here's the Smartest Way to Invest in the S&P 500 in March
bullish.reason: 認為在當前市場環境下，持續投入資金仍是正確的長期策略。

bearish.title: S&P 500 Slides, Gold Crashes As $100 Oil Stokes Stagflation Fears
bearish.reason: 油價突破 100 美元引發停滯性通膨恐慌，加上聯準會鷹派政策，導致市場賣壓沉重。

bearish.title: 4 Of The 5 PRIME Trend Factors Are Bearish (And The 5th Is Fading Fast)
bearish.reason: S&P 500 指數跌破 200 日均線，技術指標顯示趨勢全面轉空，賣壓訊號強烈。

bearish.title: Markets Starting To Worry About Stagflation, But The End Is Not Nigh
bearish.reason: 提及伊朗衝突與潛在的 200 美元油價風險，對市場韌性構成信用壓力。

bearish.title: Stocks Can Return To 2022 Levels
bearish.reason: 指出估值處於歷史極端水平，市場面臨熊市風險與潛在的深度修正。

bearish.title: Is the Vanguard S&P 500 Index Fund ETF a Buy Now? — Several leading asset managers see muted returns
bearish.reason: 多家資產管理公司預測大型股未來十年回報將趨於平淡。

bearish.title: Why The Monster Energy Rally Can't Fix The S&P 500's Pain
bearish.reason: 能源板塊雖有 33% 漲幅，但權重不足以抵銷大盤整體 3% 的跌幅。

bearish.title: S&P 500 Snapshot: Index Falls To 6-Month Low
bearish.reason: 指數跌至 6 個月低點，反映市場情緒持續惡化。

bearish.title: Weekly Market Pulse: Questions
bearish.reason: 確認 S&P 500 與納斯達克指數雙雙跌破 200 日均線，確認空頭趨勢。

neutral.title: VOO vs. SPY vs. IVV: The One Factor That Sets These S&P 500 ETFs Apart
neutral.reason: 比較同類 ETF 的差異，對股價本身無直接影響。

neutral.title: Daily ETF Flows: VOO SPYM Top the List
neutral.reason: 僅報導資金流向數據，屬於中性市場資訊。

neutral.title: Should Vanguard 500 Index Fund ETF Shares (VOO) Be on Your Investing Radar?
neutral.reason: 提供風格箱報告，屬於中性的投資參考資訊。

neutral.title: The VT ETF Might Be Smarter Than the S&P 500 Right Now
neutral.reason: 比較 VT 與 VOO 的表現，建議投資者考慮多元化配置。
